tasks.label: Docker: 编译 huanyuan1
tasks.command: sudo docker run --rm -v '/data/aiden/文档/Modularization':/workspace modularization-dev:latest bash -c 'cd /workspace/huanyuan1/thicv-pilot/planningFigure && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug 2>&1 && make -j$(nproc) 2>&1'

tasks.label: Docker: 编译 Controller
tasks.command: sudo docker run --rm -v '/data/aiden/文档/Modularization':/workspace modularization-dev:latest bash -c 'cd /workspace/Controller && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug 2>&1 && make -j$(nproc) 2>&1'

tasks.label: Docker: 清理重新编译 huanyuan1
tasks.command: sudo docker run --rm -v '/data/aiden/文档/Modularization':/workspace modularization-dev:latest bash -c 'rm -rf /workspace/huanyuan1/thicv-pilot/planningFigure/build && mkdir -p /workspace/huanyuan1/thicv-pilot/planningFigure/build && cd /workspace/huanyuan1/thicv-pilot/planningFigure/build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && make -j$(nproc) 2>&1'
